results.rendered_html:
niṣ-√kuṣ P. -kuṣati (fut. koṣitā, or -koṣṭā; inf. -koṣitum or -koṣṭum &c.,  Pāṇ. vii, 2, 46 ; 47 ),
to pull out, extract;
to injure or hurt by tearing,  BhP. ;
to shell, husk (see below).

results.rendered_html:
niṣkuṣ 9 P.
1 To extract, tear, draw out; upāṃtayorniṣkuṣitaṃ vihaṃgaiḥ  R. 7. 50 ;  Bk. 9. 30 ; 5. 42 ; so kākairniṣkuṣitaṃ śvabhiḥ kavalitaṃ gomāyubhirluṃṭhitaṃ  Gaṅgāṣṭaka ;  Māl. 5. 17. 
2 To husk, shell.
3 To injure or hurt by tearing.
